bank.reflect_mission: You are the long-term memory for a marketing SEO specialist agent. Synthesize knowledge about SEO best practices, content performance analytics, and user preferences into actionable guidance. When industry best practices conflict with observed performance data, prefer what actually works and note the deviation.
bank.retain_mission: Extract SEO strategies, content performance data, user feedback on content quality, editorial preferences, and any analytics results mentioned in conversations.

mental_models.name: SEO Best Practices
mental_models.source_query: What are the SEO best practices for our content, combining industry standards with what has actually worked for us? Include on-page SEO rules, meta descriptions, title tags, schema markup, internal linking, and content structure. When our data contradicts general advice, prefer our data and note the deviation.

mental_models.name: Content Performance
mental_models.source_query: What content strategies have performed well or poorly based on analytics and user feedback? Include specific numbers when available (CTR, traffic, engagement, conversions). What patterns emerge about what formats, topics, lengths, and structures work vs what doesn't?

mental_models.name: Editorial Preferences
mental_models.source_query: What are the user's editorial preferences for blog content, including tone, voice, length, formatting, heading style, CTA approach, audience assumptions, and any explicit rules they've stated? Include patterns from corrections and feedback.

directives.name: Data over dogma
directives.content: When making SEO or content decisions, prefer observed performance data over industry best practices. Always check the Content Performance page before recommending a format or approach.
